notes: Corrected type from Audio interface to Wireless mic. The UWP-D21 package includes UTX-B40 bodypack transmitter, URX-P40 portable diversity tuner receiver, and ECM-V1BMP lavalier mic. rackUnits omitted as this is a wearable/camera-mount system. UTX-B40 USB-C is a service port (manual p.10), not a user power input, though USB power is technically functional per p.16. URX-P40 USB-C is a normal user power port. Both units primarily run on 2x AA batteries. Phantom power on UTX-B40 MIC input is not confirmed in manual.

ports.name: UTX-B40 MIC Input
ports.note: 3.5mm 3-pole locking mini jack on UTX-B40 bodypack transmitter. MIC and LINE modes selectable.

ports.name: UTX-B40 USB-C (Service only)
ports.note: Labeled 'For use by service personnel' in parts diagram (manual p.10). USB power at DC 5V/200mA+ is technically possible (p.16) but this is not a standard user-accessible power input.

ports.name: URX-P40 Audio Output
ports.note: 3.5mm 3-pole locking mini jack on URX-P40 receiver. XLR-BMP conversion cable included for connecting to XLR camera inputs.

ports.name: URX-P40 Headphone Output
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo mini jack on URX-P40 for monitoring received audio.

ports.name: URX-P40 USB-C Power
ports.note: User-accessible USB-C on URX-P40 receiver. DC 5.0V from a commercially available USB portable power supply.
